    Struct VertexJoints8

    Defines a Vertex attribute with up to 65535 bone joints and 8 weights.

    Inherited Members
    ValueType.ToString()
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetType()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry.VertexTypes
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public struct VertexJoints8 : IVertexSkinning, IEquatable<VertexJoints8>

    Constructors

    Name Description
    VertexJoints8(in SparseWeight8)
    VertexJoints8(int)
    VertexJoints8(params (int JointIndex, float Weight)[])

    Fields

    Name Description
    Joints0

    Stores the indices of the first 4 joints.
    Joints1

    Stores the indices of the next 4 joints.
    Weights0

    Stores the weights of the first 4 joints.
    Weights1

    Stores the weights of the next 4 joints.

    Properties

    Name Description
    MaxBindings

    Gets the Number of valid joints supported.
    Typical values are 0, 4 or 8.
